display.name: Refik Fluid of Flora
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A slow horizontal current of botanical imagery suspended in a dark gallery void, with luminous warm accents catching the light.

annotation.technical_notes: An external floral image texture is mapped and distorted via a fluid per-pixel warp shader, creating a slow-rolling liquid tapestry effect. The warp field is modulated by the low-frequency bands of the audio, causing the dense floral layers to ripple and swell in time with the music. High frame feedback via sampler_main and a low decay rate preserve the soft, painterly edges of the overlapping petals.
